title: crantzia sprucei
intro: Crantzia sprucei, commonly known as the Mexican prickly poppy or prickly poppy, is a species of flowering plant in the cactus family (Cactaceae). This plant is valued for its potential health benefits, which include reducing inflammation, pain relief, and antioxidant properties. The therapeutic actions of Crantzia sprucei are attributed to its ability to stimulate digestion, reduce fever, and exhibit antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory properties. The bioactive constituents of this plant include alkaloids, flavonoids, and glycosides, which contribute to its medicinal properties.
